modules.name: DocConverter-L2G
modules.when_to_use: At intake, before scope preparation and workshop setup.
modules.allowed: Normalize local documents, diagrams, evidence, and meeting sources into draft packages.
modules.prohibited: Final scope, Met/Not Met, evidence sufficiency, readiness, scoring, or certification conclusions.
modules.next: L2G Scoper or CMMC L2 Gap Workshop Tool

evidence.release_focus: Provenance Explorer and source-to-output reverse trace
evidence.regression: Runtime regression PASS; 0 page errors; 0 console errors; 0 network requests; permitted packages emitted at v1.0.
evidence.manifest_source: DocConverter-L2G_v7.9.5 release, compatibility, and runtime regression manifests

modules.name: L2G Scoper
modules.when_to_use: After intake normalization, to validate the draft CUI boundary and dependencies.
modules.allowed: Propose draft assets, flows, providers, services, categories, rationale, and validation questions.
modules.prohibited: Final scope, assessment status, evidence sufficiency, scoring, or certification conclusions.

evidence.result: PASS WITH NATIVE FILE LAUNCH LIMITATION
evidence.release_focus: Technology, Service, and Provider Scoping Profile
evidence.regression: Technology/service/provider handshake passed; 0 blocking preflight errors; native file launch blocked by managed environment.
evidence.manifest_source: L2G_Scoper_v3.11 release, compatibility, and regression manifests

modules.name: CMMC L2 Gap Workshop Tool
modules.when_to_use: For preparation, live facilitation, evidence follow-up, workbook handoff/return review, and governed SSP handoff/return review.
modules.allowed: Facilitate ownership, evidence, providers, practices, objectives, actions, follow-up, and advisory reporting.
modules.prohibited: Automatic final Met/Not Met, final evidence sufficiency, readiness, final scope, scoring, or certification.
inputs: Intake, scope return, meeting context, workshop state, workbook merge, SSP return package
modules.next: L2G Builder/Merger or CMMC Level 2 SSP Modern Editable, then return to Workshop

evidence.regression: Static and focused runtime checks passed; 74/76 in synthetic-origin self-check with CSP/localStorage limitations disclosed; 0 browser page errors.
evidence.manifest_source: CMMC_L2_Gap_Workshop_v76 release, compatibility, regression, observability, and responsibility artifacts

modules.name: L2G Builder/Merger
modules.when_to_use: After Workshop handoff, with the designated formal workbook.
modules.allowed: Populate designated workbook cells, preserve formulas/validation, resolve governed exceptions, and extract reviewer-derived results.
modules.prohibited: Infer objective implementation status or create assessment conclusions from draft Workshop context.
modules.next: CMMC L2 Gap Workshop Tool / Workbook Loop

evidence.release_focus: Exception Resolution Ledger and Governance Pack
evidence.regression: JavaScript syntax and offline controls passed; browser smoke test not counted due managed Chromium timeout.
evidence.manifest_source: L2G-BM_v3.8 release manifest and regression results

modules.name: CMMC Level 2 SSP Modern Editable
modules.persona: SSP author / SME reviewer / Quality reviewer
modules.when_to_use: After Workshop context is mature enough to draft and review the SSP.
modules.allowed: Preview and selectively apply Workshop authoring candidates, maintain SSP content, support SME and Quality Review, and return a governed authoring/review overlay to Workshop.
modules.prohibited: Automatic compliance conclusions, automatic final scope, automatic Met/Not Met or readiness determinations, replacing SME/Quality Review/authorized approval, or duplicating SSP field editing inside Control Center.
modules.next: CMMC L2 Gap Workshop Tool / SSP Return Import

evidence.release_focus: L2G Workshop Handshake and SSP Return Foundation
evidence.regression: 107/107 tests passed across release integrity, Chromium handshake, compatibility/image security, and Word-review security.
evidence.manifest_source: CMMC_L2_SSP_v1.7 release, compatibility, and regression manifests
